info.title: Wii U Verifier
info.author: Jamison Smith
info.details:
This tool uses information from your Wii U to generate a hash that can be used to verify yourself as a real Wii U owner.
Use it with a Discord Bot in the supported Discord servers to verify yourself.
The tool DOES require internet access.

Thank you to LotP for allowing me to use some parts of their description, and logo.

Supported Discord Servers:
- MeloNX
